<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8" />
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
<title>Lemon Square Bakery</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Poppins:wght@400;500;600;700;800&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />
<style>
  *, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }

  :root {
    --yellow: #F5C518;
    --yellow-dark: #E0AE00;
    --yellow-light: #FFF8D6;
    --dark: #1A1A1A;
    --text: #333;
    --muted: #888;
    --border: #EBEBEB;
    --white: #fff;
    --green: #4CAF50;
    --red: #E53935;
    --bg: #F7F7F7;
    --card: #fff;
    --radius: 16px;
    --radius-sm: 10px;
  }

  /* DARK MODE */
  [data-theme="dark"] {
    --dark: #F0F0F0;
    --text: #DDDDDD;
    --muted: #AAAAAA;
    --border: #2E2E2E;
    --white: #1E1E1E;
    --bg: #121212;
    --card: #1E1E1E;
    --yellow-light: #3A2E00;
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] body {
    background: #0A0A0A;
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .bottom-nav {
    background: var(--white);
    border-top-color: var(--border);
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .success-overlay {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.97);
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .modal-sheet {
    background: #1E1E1E;
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .lang-option {
    color: var(--text);
    border-bottom-color: var(--border);
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .modal-close-btn {
    background: #2A2A2A;
    color: var(--text);
  }
  [data-theme="dark"] .profile-item:hover { background: #252525; }
  [data-theme="dark"] .search-bar { background: #2A2A2A; }
  [data-theme="dark"] .search-bar input { color: var(--text); }
  [data-theme="dark"] .promo-input { background: #2A2A2A; color: var(--text); border-color: var(--border); }
  [data-theme="dark"] .filter-tab:not(.active) { background: #2A2A2A; color: var(--text); border-color: var(--border); }

  /* THEME TOGGLE BUTTON */
  .theme-toggle-btn {
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.08);
    border: none;
    border-radius: 50%;
    width: 38px; height: 38px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 17px;
    transition: background .15s;
  }
  .theme-toggle-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.16); }

  body {
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    background: #e8e8e8;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: flex-start;
    min-height: 100vh;
    padding: 20px;
  }

  /* PHONE SHELL */
  .phone {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 390px;
    min-height: 100vh;
    background: var(--bg);
    border-radius: 36px;
    box-shadow: 0 24px 80px rgba(0,0,0,.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
  }

  /* SCREENS */
  .screen { display: none; flex-direction: column; height: 100%; flex: 1; }
  .screen.active { display: flex; }

  /* ── SHARED HEADER ── */
  .header-yellow {
    background: var(--yellow);
    padding: 18px 20px 16px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .logo-wrap { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; }
  .logo-icon {
    width: 52px; height: 52px;
    background: #fff;
    border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 22px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  }
  .logo-tagline { font-size: 9px; color: #5A3D00; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 2px; letter-spacing: .3px; }
  .header-icons { display: flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; }
  .icon-btn {
    background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    width: 38px; height: 38px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    border-radius: 50%;
    position: relative;
    transition: background .15s;
  }
  .icon-btn:hover { background: rgba(0,0,0,.08); }
  .icon-btn svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; stroke: var(--dark); fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }
  .badge {
    position: absolute; top: -2px; right: -2px;
    background: var(--red); color: #fff;
    font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
    width: 16px; height: 16px;
    border-radius: 50%; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  }

  /* SCROLLABLE BODY */
  .screen-body { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding-bottom: 80px; }
  .screen-body::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }

  /* ── BOTTOM NAV ── */
  .bottom-nav {
    position: sticky; bottom: 0;
    background: var(--white);
    display: flex; align-items: center;
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    padding: 8px 0 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    z-index: 10;
  }
  .nav-item {
    flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 3px;
    cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500;
    transition: color .15s;
    padding: 4px 0;
  }
  .nav-item svg { width: 20px; height: 20px; stroke: currentColor; fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }
  .nav-item.active { color: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .nav-item.active svg { stroke: var(--yellow-dark); }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     SCREEN 1 – HOME
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .flash-deal-card {
    margin: 16px;
    background: var(--yellow-light);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 18px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 12px;
    border: 1.5px solid #F5E08A;
  }
  .flash-deal-left { flex: 1; }
  .flash-label {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #C47D00; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
  }
  .flash-label svg { width: 14px; height: 14px; stroke: #C47D00; fill: none; stroke-width: 2.5; }
  .flash-off { font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); line-height: 1; }
  .flash-name { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text); margin: 4px 0 12px; }
  .btn-yellow {
    background: var(--yellow);
    border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 9px 18px;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    transition: background .15s, transform .1s;
  }
  .btn-yellow:active { transform: scale(.97); }
  .btn-yellow:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .flash-img {
    width: 90px; height: 80px;
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    object-fit: cover;
    background: #ddd;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    overflow: hidden;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 32px;
  }

  /* dots */
  .dots { display: flex; justify-content: center; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .dot { width: 7px; height: 7px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--border); }
  .dot.active { background: var(--yellow-dark); width: 18px; border-radius: 999px; }

  /* section header */
  .section-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 16px 16px 10px;
  }
  .section-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); letter-spacing: .5px; text-transform: uppercase; }
  .see-all { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--yellow-dark); cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; }

  /* category pills */
  .cat-scroll-wrap { overflow-x: auto; padding: 0 16px 12px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: flex-end; }
  .cat-scroll-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .cat-item {
    display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
    cursor: pointer; flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: transform .15s;
  }
  .cat-item:active { transform: scale(.93); }
  .cat-circle {
    width: 62px; height: 62px;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--white);
    border: 2px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 26px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
    transition: border-color .15s;
  }
  .cat-item.active .cat-circle, .cat-item:hover .cat-circle { border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .cat-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }

  /* discover grid */
  .discover-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; padding: 0 16px; }
  .product-card {
    background: var(--card);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
    transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
  }
  .product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
  .product-img {
    width: 100%; height: 110px;
    object-fit: cover;
    background: #eee;
    position: relative;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 40px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .product-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .heart-btn {
    position: absolute; top: 8px; right: 8px;
    width: 28px; height: 28px;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.9);
    border-radius: 50%; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 14px;
    transition: transform .15s;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
  }
  .heart-btn:active { transform: scale(1.2); }
  .product-info { padding: 10px 10px 12px; }
  .product-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .product-price { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .price-currency { font-size: 11px; }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     SCREEN 2 – CATEGORIES
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .search-bar-wrap { padding: 14px 16px; background: var(--yellow); }
  .search-bar {
    background: var(--white);
    border-radius: 999px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
    padding: 10px 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  }
  .search-bar svg { width: 16px; height: 16px; stroke: var(--muted); fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .search-bar input {
    border: none; outline: none;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px; color: var(--text);
    background: transparent; flex: 1;
  }
  .search-bar input::placeholder { color: #bbb; }

  .filter-tabs-wrap { overflow-x: auto; padding: 14px 16px 10px; display: flex; gap: 8px; }
  .filter-tabs-wrap::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; }
  .filter-tab {
    border: none; border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 16px;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px;
    transition: background .15s, color .15s;
  }
  .filter-tab.active { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--dark); }
  .filter-tab:not(.active) { background: var(--white); color: var(--text); border: 1.5px solid var(--border); }

  .all-treats-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 10px 16px 6px;
  }
  .treats-title { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; }
  .treats-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; }

  .treats-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 14px; padding: 6px 16px; }
  .treat-card {
    background: var(--card); border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden; cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
    transition: transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
    position: relative;
  }
  .treat-card:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.12); }
  .treat-img {
    width: 100%; height: 110px;
    object-fit: cover;
    background: #eee;
    position: relative; overflow: hidden;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 38px;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .treat-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .cat-badge {
    position: absolute; top: 8px; left: 8px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.55); color: #fff;
    font-size: 9px; font-weight: 700;
    padding: 2px 7px; border-radius: 999px;
    backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }
  .treat-info { padding: 8px 10px 10px; }
  .treat-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .treat-price-row { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
  .treat-price { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .add-btn {
    width: 26px; height: 26px;
    background: var(--yellow); border: none; border-radius: 50%;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer; font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    transition: background .15s, transform .1s;
  }
  .add-btn:active { transform: scale(.9); }
  .add-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     SCREEN 3 – PRODUCT DETAIL
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .detail-header {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 18px 16px 12px;
  }
  .back-btn {
    width: 36px; height: 36px;
    border-radius: 50%; background: var(--white);
    border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,.08);
  }
  .back-btn svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; stroke: var(--dark); fill: none; stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }
  .detail-img-wrap {
    width: 100%; height: 220px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: #f0f0f0;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 80px;
  }
  .detail-img-wrap img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .logo-chip {
    position: absolute; bottom: 12px; left: 16px;
    background: var(--yellow); border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  }
  .rating-chip {
    position: absolute; bottom: 12px; right: 16px;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.65); border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #fff;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
  }
  .star { color: var(--yellow); }

  .detail-body { padding: 16px 16px 0; }
  .detail-name-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .detail-name { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); line-height: 1.2; }
  .detail-price-wrap { text-align: right; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .detail-price { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .detail-per { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }
  .detail-brand { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .pill-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .pill {
    font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; border-radius: 999px; padding: 3px 10px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px;
  }
  .pill-orange { background: #FFF3E0; color: #E65100; }
  .pill-green { background: #E8F5E9; color: #2E7D32; }
  .detail-desc { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); line-height: 1.6; margin-bottom: 14px; }

  .size-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .size-options { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .size-btn {
    flex: 1; border-radius: var(--radius-sm); padding: 10px 6px;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--border); background: var(--white);
    cursor: pointer; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; text-align: center;
    transition: border-color .15s, background .15s;
  }
  .size-btn.active { background: var(--yellow); border-color: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .size-btn .size-name { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); }
  .size-btn .size-price { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }
  .size-btn.active .size-price { color: var(--dark); }

  .perks-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 8px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .perk-card {
    background: var(--yellow-light); border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 10px 12px; display: flex; align-items: flex-start; gap: 8px;
  }
  .perk-icon { font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
  .perk-text .perk-title { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); }
  .perk-text .perk-sub { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }

  .qty-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .qty-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 16px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .qty-btn {
    width: 34px; height: 34px;
    border-radius: 50%; border: 1.5px solid var(--border);
    background: var(--white); cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: background .15s, border-color .15s;
  }
  .qty-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-light); border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .qty-val { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); min-width: 24px; text-align: center; }

  .detail-footer {
    padding: 14px 16px 24px;
    background: var(--white);
    border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 12px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .total-wrap .total-label { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }
  .total-wrap .total-val { font-size: 20px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .add-cart-btn {
    flex: 1; background: var(--yellow); border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 14px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    cursor: pointer; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
    transition: background .15s, transform .1s;
  }
  .add-cart-btn:active { transform: scale(.97); }
  .add-cart-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .add-cart-btn svg { width: 18px; height: 18px; stroke: var(--dark); fill: none; stroke-width: 2; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     SCREEN 4 – CART
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .cart-header-yellow {
    background: var(--yellow);
    padding: 18px 20px 16px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .cart-back { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; }
  .cart-back svg { width: 22px; height: 22px; stroke: var(--dark); fill: none; stroke-width: 2.5; stroke-linecap: round; stroke-linejoin: round; }

  .cart-title-wrap { padding: 20px 16px 12px; }
  .cart-title { font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .cart-subtitle { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); }

  .cart-item {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: var(--radius);
    margin: 0 16px 10px; padding: 12px 14px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  }
  .cart-item-img {
    width: 58px; height: 58px; border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    object-fit: cover; background: #eee;
    flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 26px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    overflow: hidden;
  }
  .cart-item-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .cart-item-info { flex: 1; }
  .cart-item-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 2px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; max-width: 140px; }
  .cart-item-size { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .cart-item-price { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .cart-item-controls { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-end; gap: 8px; }
  .remove-btn { font-size: 11px; color: var(--red); font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; }
  .mini-qty { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
  .mini-qty-btn {
    width: 26px; height: 26px; border-radius: 50%;
    border: 1.5px solid var(--border); background: var(--white);
    cursor: pointer; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    transition: background .15s;
  }
  .mini-qty-btn.plus { background: var(--yellow); border-color: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .mini-qty-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-light); }
  .mini-qty-btn.plus:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .mini-qty-val { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); min-width: 18px; text-align: center; }

  .promo-wrap { margin: 4px 16px 14px; }
  .promo-label { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
  .promo-label span { color: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .promo-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; }
  .promo-input {
    flex: 1; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 10px 16px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px; color: var(--text); outline: none;
    background: var(--white);
    transition: border-color .15s;
  }
  .promo-input:focus { border-color: var(--yellow); }
  .apply-btn {
    background: var(--yellow); border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 10px 18px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s;
  }
  .apply-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }

  .summary-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: var(--radius);
    margin: 0 16px; padding: 14px 16px;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  }
  .summary-row {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    padding: 5px 0;
    font-size: 13px; color: var(--text);
  }
  .summary-row.total {
    border-top: 1.5px dashed var(--border);
    margin-top: 6px; padding-top: 10px;
    font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark);
  }
  .free-tag { color: var(--green); font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px; }
  .free-note { font-size: 10px; color: var(--green); margin-top: 1px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 3px; }

  .cart-footer {
    padding: 14px 16px 24px;
    background: var(--white); border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .checkout-btn {
    width: 100%; background: var(--yellow); border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 15px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, transform .1s;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px;
  }
  .checkout-btn:active { transform: scale(.98); }
  .checkout-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     SCREEN 5 – PLACE ORDER
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .order-page-title { padding: 18px 16px 6px; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .order-subtitle { padding: 0 16px 14px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); }

  .delivery-tabs { display: flex; background: var(--white); border-radius: 999px; margin: 0 16px 16px; overflow: hidden; border: 1.5px solid var(--border); padding: 3px; gap: 3px; }
  .delivery-tab {
    flex: 1; border: none; background: none;
    padding: 9px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--muted);
    border-radius: 999px; cursor: pointer;
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 5px;
    transition: background .15s, color .15s;
  }
  .delivery-tab.active { background: var(--yellow); color: var(--dark); }

  .order-section { margin: 0 16px 12px; }
  .order-card {
    background: var(--white); border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 14px 16px; box-shadow: 0 1px 6px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  }
  .order-card-header {
    display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
  }
  .order-card-title { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--muted); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; }
  .change-btn { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--yellow-dark); cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; }
  .address-name { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 2px; }
  .address-line { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 6px; }
  .address-phone { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 6px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
  .eta-badge { background: var(--yellow-light); border-radius: 999px; padding: 4px 10px; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; color: #7A5200; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }

  .order-items-header { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center; margin-bottom: 10px; }
  .order-items-count { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; }
  .order-item-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 6px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
  .order-item-row:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .order-item-img { width: 42px; height: 42px; border-radius: 8px; background: #eee; object-fit: cover; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; }
  .order-item-img img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
  .order-item-info { flex: 1; }
  .order-item-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--dark); }
  .order-item-sub { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }
  .order-item-price { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); }

  .payment-option {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 10px 0;
  }
  .payment-left { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
  .payment-icon { width: 36px; height: 36px; background: #1A73E8; border-radius: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: #fff; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 800; }
  .payment-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--dark); }
  .payment-num { font-size: 11px; color: var(--muted); }
  .radio-dot { width: 20px; height: 20px; border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--yellow-dark); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
  .radio-dot::after { content: ''; width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow); }

  .place-order-footer {
    padding: 14px 16px 24px;
    background: var(--white); border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .place-order-btn {
    width: 100%; background: var(--yellow); border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 15px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 15px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark);
    cursor: pointer; transition: background .15s, transform .1s;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
  }
  .place-order-btn:active { transform: scale(.98); }
  .place-order-btn:hover { background: var(--yellow-dark); }
  .tos-note { text-align: center; font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); }
  .tos-note a { color: var(--yellow-dark); text-decoration: none; }

  /* Toast */
  .toast {
    position: fixed; bottom: 100px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
    background: #222; color: #fff; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
    z-index: 999; opacity: 0; pointer-events: none;
    transition: opacity .3s;
    white-space: nowrap;
  }
  .toast.show { opacity: 1; }

  /* Success overlay */
  .success-overlay {
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background: rgba(255,255,255,.97);
    display: none; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    z-index: 100; text-align: center; padding: 32px;
  }
  .success-overlay.show { display: flex; }
  .success-icon { font-size: 70px; margin-bottom: 16px; }
  .success-title { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 8px; }
  .success-sub { font-size: 14px; color: var(--muted); margin-bottom: 28px; line-height: 1.6; }
  .success-btn {
    background: var(--yellow); border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 14px 36px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); cursor: pointer;
  }

  /* nav badge (on Alerts icon in bottom nav) */
  .nav-badge {
    position: absolute; top: -2px; right: 18px;
    width: 16px; height: 16px; font-size: 9px;
  }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     NOTIFICATIONS SCREEN
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .notif-header-row {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 4px 4px 0;
  }
  .notif-title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .clear-all-btn {
    background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600;
    color: var(--yellow-dark);
  }
  .notif-list { padding: 14px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 10px; }
  .notif-card {
    display: flex; gap: 12px;
    background: var(--card);
    border-radius: var(--radius-sm);
    padding: 14px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.05);
    position: relative;
    border: 1px solid var(--border);
  }
  .notif-card.unread { background: var(--yellow-light); border-color: #F5E08A; }
  .notif-icon {
    width: 40px; height: 40px; flex-shrink: 0;
    border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--yellow-light);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 19px;
  }
  .notif-card.unread .notif-icon { background: #fff; }
  .notif-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .notif-top-row { display: flex; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: space-between; gap: 8px; }
  .notif-name { font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--dark); }
  .notif-time { font-size: 10px; color: var(--muted); white-space: nowrap; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 1px; }
  .notif-msg { font-size: 12px; color: var(--text); margin-top: 3px; line-height: 1.5; }
  .notif-dot {
    width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--yellow-dark);
    position: absolute; top: 14px; right: 14px;
  }
  .notif-empty {
    text-align: center; padding: 60px 24px; color: var(--muted);
  }
  .notif-empty-icon { font-size: 44px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  .notif-empty-title { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .notif-empty-sub { font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; }

  /* ══════════════════════════════════
     PROFILE SCREEN
  ══════════════════════════════════ */
  .profile-card {
    margin: 16px;
    background: var(--card);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    padding: 20px;
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 14px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  }
  .profile-avatar {
    width: 62px; height: 62px; border-radius: 50%;
    background: var(--yellow);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 26px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark);
    flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .profile-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
  .profile-name { font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); }
  .profile-email { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); margin-top: 2px; }
  .profile-edit-btn {
    background: var(--yellow-light); border: 1px solid #F5E08A; cursor: pointer;
    border-radius: 999px; padding: 7px 14px;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #8a6500;
  }
  .profile-section-label {
    font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--muted);
    text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .5px;
    padding: 4px 20px 8px;
  }
  .profile-menu {
    margin: 0 16px 16px;
    background: var(--card);
    border-radius: var(--radius);
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  }
  .profile-item {
    display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
    padding: 14px 16px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    cursor: pointer; background: none; border-left: none; border-right: none; border-top: none;
    width: 100%; text-align: left;
    font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    transition: background .15s;
  }
  .profile-item:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
  .profile-item:hover { background: #FAFAFA; }
  .profile-item-icon {
    width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 9px;
    background: var(--yellow-light);
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
    font-size: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;
  }
  .profile-item-text { flex: 1; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text); }
  .profile-item-value { font-size: 12px; color: var(--muted); font-weight: 500; }
  .profile-item-chevron { font-size: 16px; color: var(--muted); }
  .profile-item.logout .profile-item-text { color: var(--red); }
  .profile-item.logout .profile-item-icon { background: #FDECEA; }

  /* language modal */
  .modal-overlay {
    position: fixed; inset: 0;
    background: rgba(0,0,0,.4);
    display: none; align-items: flex-end; justify-content: center;
    z-index: 200;
  }
  .modal-overlay.show { display: flex; }
  .modal-sheet {
    background: #fff; width: 100%; max-width: 390px;
    border-radius: 22px 22px 0 0;
    padding: 22px 20px 28px;
  }
  .modal-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--dark); margin-bottom: 14px; }
  .lang-option {
    display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
    padding: 14px 4px;
    border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
    cursor: pointer;
    font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: var(--text);
  }
  .lang-option:last-of-type { border-bottom: none; }
  .lang-check { color: var(--yellow-dark); font-weight: 800; font-size: 16px; opacity: 0; }
  .lang-option.selected .lang-check { opacity: 1; }
  .modal-close-btn {
    margin-top: 16px; width: 100%;
    background: var(--bg); border: none; border-radius: 999px;
    padding: 13px; font-family: 'Poppins', sans-serif;
    font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--text); cursor: pointer;
  }

  /* Responsive: on large screens, show proper phone */
  @media (min-width: 500px) {
    body { padding: 40px 20px; }
    .phone { border-radius: 48px; min-height: 820px; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 420px) {
    body { padding: 0; background: var(--bg); }
    .phone { border-radius: 0; max-width: 100%; min-height: 100dvh; }
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<div class="phone" id="app">

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 1: HOME ══ -->
  <div class="screen active" id="screen-home">
    <div class="header-yellow">
      <div style="width:38px"></div>
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);" alt="Lemon Square" />
        <div class="logo-tagline">Always real goodness</div>
      </div>
      <div class="header-icons">
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('categories')" title="Search">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
        </button>
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('cart')" title="Cart">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
          <div class="badge" id="home-cart-badge">2</div>
        </button>
        <button class="theme-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleTheme()" id="theme-btn" title="Toggle theme">🌙</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body">
      <!-- Flash Deal -->
      <div class="flash-deal-card">
        <div class="flash-deal-left">
          <div class="flash-label">
            <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polygon points="13 2 3 14 12 14 11 22 21 10 12 10 13 2"/></svg>
            Flash Deal
          </div>
          <div class="flash-off">20% OFF</div>
          <div class="flash-name">Triple Chocolate Cake<br>Today Only!</div>
          <button class="btn-yellow" onclick="goDetail('triple-choc')">SHOP NOW ›</button>
        </div>
        <div class="flash-img"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;border-radius:10px;" alt="Triple Chocolate Cake" /></div>
      </div>

      <!-- dots -->
      <div class="dots">
        <div class="dot active"></div>
        <div class="dot"></div>
        <div class="dot"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Browse by Category -->
      <div class="section-header">
        <span class="section-title">Browse by Category</span>
        <button class="see-all" onclick="goScreen('categories')">See all ›</button>
      </div>
      <div class="cat-scroll-wrap">
        <div class="cat-item active" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
          <div class="cat-circle">🎂</div>
          <span class="cat-label">Cakes</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
          <div class="cat-circle">🥐</div>
          <span class="cat-label">Pastries</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
          <div class="cat-circle">🍪</div>
          <span class="cat-label">Cookies</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
          <div class="cat-circle">🍩</div>
          <span class="cat-label">Donuts</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cat-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
          <div class="cat-circle">🧁</div>
          <span class="cat-label">Cupcakes</span>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Daily Discover -->
      <div class="section-header">
        <span class="section-title">Daily Discover</span>
        <button class="see-all" onclick="goScreen('categories')">See all ›</button>
      </div>
      <div class="discover-grid">
        <div class="product-card" onclick="goDetail('ube-keso')">
          <div class="product-img">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="Ube Keso Cake" />
            <button class="heart-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleHeart(this)">🤍</button>
          </div>
          <div class="product-info">
            <div class="product-name">Ube Keso cake</div>
            <div class="product-price"><span class="price-currency">₱</span>500</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="product-card" onclick="goDetail('blueberry-cc')">
          <div class="product-img">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="Blueberry Cheesecake" />
            <button class="heart-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleHeart(this)">🤍</button>
          </div>
          <div class="product-info">
            <div class="product-name">Blueberry Cheesecake</div>
            <div class="product-price"><span class="price-currency">₱</span>480</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="product-card" onclick="goDetail('triple-choc')">
          <div class="product-img">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="Triple Chocolate Cake" />
            <button class="heart-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleHeart(this)">🤍</button>
          </div>
          <div class="product-info">
            <div class="product-name">Triple Chocolate Cake</div>
            <div class="product-price"><span class="price-currency">₱</span>550</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="product-card" onclick="goDetail('cream-puffs')">
          <div class="product-img">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="Cream Puffs" />
            <button class="heart-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleHeart(this)">🤍</button>
          </div>
          <div class="product-info">
            <div class="product-name">Cream Puffs (6pcs)</div>
            <div class="product-price"><span class="price-currency">₱</span>240</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bottom-nav">
      <button class="nav-item active" onclick="goScreen('home')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
        Home
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
        Categories
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('notifications')" style="position:relative;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
        Alerts
        <div class="badge nav-badge" id="alerts-badge-home" style="display:none;">0</div>
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('profile')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
        Profile
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 2: CATEGORIES ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-categories">
    <div class="header-yellow">
      <div style="width:38px"></div>
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);" alt="Lemon Square" />
        <div class="logo-tagline">Always real goodness</div>
      </div>
      <div class="header-icons">
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('cart')" title="Cart">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
          <div class="badge" id="cat-cart-badge">2</div>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="search-bar-wrap">
      <div class="search-bar">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><line x1="21" y1="21" x2="16.65" y2="16.65"/></svg>
        <input type="text" placeholder="Search bakery treats..." id="search-input" oninput="filterTreats()" />
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="filter-tabs-wrap" id="filter-tabs">
      <button class="filter-tab active" onclick="setFilter('All', this)">🍽 All</button>
      <button class="filter-tab" onclick="setFilter('Cakes', this)">🎂 Cakes</button>
      <button class="filter-tab" onclick="setFilter('Pastries', this)">🥐 Pastries</button>
      <button class="filter-tab" onclick="setFilter('Cookies', this)">🍪 Cookies</button>
      <button class="filter-tab" onclick="setFilter('Donuts', this)">🍩 Donuts</button>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body" style="padding-bottom:80px;">
      <div class="all-treats-header">
        <span class="treats-title" id="filter-heading">ALL TREATS</span>
        <span class="treats-count" id="treats-count">12 items</span>
      </div>
      <div class="treats-grid" id="treats-grid">
        <!-- filled by JS -->
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bottom-nav">
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('home')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
        Home
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item active" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
        Categories
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('notifications')" style="position:relative;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
        Alerts
        <div class="badge nav-badge" id="alerts-badge-categories" style="display:none;">0</div>
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('profile')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
        Profile
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 3: PRODUCT DETAIL ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-detail" style="background:#fff;">
    <div class="detail-header" style="background:#fff;">
      <button class="back-btn" onclick="history.go(-1) || goScreen('categories')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg>
      </button>
      <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;">
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="toggleHeart(this)">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20.84 4.61a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 0L12 5.67l-1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0-7.78 7.78l1.06 1.06L12 21.23l7.78-7.78 1.06-1.06a5.5 5.5 0 0 0 0-7.78z"/></svg>
        </button>
        <button class="icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('cart')" style="position:relative;">
          <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
          <div class="badge" id="detail-cart-badge">2</div>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body" style="padding-bottom:0; overflow-y:auto;">
      <div class="detail-img-wrap" id="detail-img"><img id="detail-main-img" src="" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" alt="" />
        <div class="logo-chip">🍋 Lemon Square</div>
        <div class="rating-chip"><span class="star">★</span> 4.8 <span style="opacity:.7;">(210)</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="detail-body">
        <div class="detail-name-row">
          <div class="detail-name" id="detail-name">Triple Chocolate Cake</div>
          <div class="detail-price-wrap">
            <div class="detail-price" id="detail-price">₱550</div>
            <div class="detail-per">per piece</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="detail-brand">Lemon Square Bakery Treats</div>
        <div class="pill-row">
          <span class="pill pill-orange">🏆 Bestseller</span>
          <span class="pill pill-green">✔ In Stock</span>
        </div>
        <p class="detail-desc" id="detail-desc">Rich triple-layered chocolate cake with decadent ganache, moist chocolate sponge, and dark chocolate shavings. A crowd favorite for celebrations and everyday indulgence.</p>

        <div class="size-label">Choose Size</div>
        <div class="size-options" id="size-options">
          <button class="size-btn active" onclick="selectSize(this, 0)">
            <div class="size-name">Regular</div>
            <div class="size-price">₱550</div>
          </button>
          <button class="size-btn" onclick="selectSize(this, 1)">
            <div class="size-name">Large</div>
            <div class="size-price">+₱80</div>
          </button>
          <button class="size-btn" onclick="selectSize(this, 2)">
            <div class="size-name">XL</div>
            <div class="size-price">+₱150</div>
          </button>
        </div>

        <div class="perks-row">
          <div class="perk-card">
            <div class="perk-icon">🚚</div>
            <div class="perk-text">
              <div class="perk-title">Free Delivery</div>
              <div class="perk-sub">Order ₱500+</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="perk-card">
            <div class="perk-icon">🌿</div>
            <div class="perk-text">
              <div class="perk-title">Fresh Daily</div>
              <div class="perk-sub">Baked every morning</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div class="qty-label">Quantity</div>
        <div class="qty-row">
          <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(-1)">−</button>
          <span class="qty-val" id="qty-val">1</span>
          <button class="qty-btn" onclick="changeQty(1)">+</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="detail-footer">
      <div class="total-wrap">
        <div class="total-label">Total Price</div>
        <div class="total-val" id="detail-total">₱550</div>
      </div>
      <button class="add-cart-btn" onclick="addToCart()">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
        Add to Cart
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 4: CART ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-cart">
    <div class="cart-header-yellow">
      <button class="cart-back icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('home')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--dark);fill:none;stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg>
      </button>
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);" alt="Lemon Square" />
        <div class="logo-tagline">Always real goodness</div>
      </div>
      <button class="icon-btn" style="position:relative;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="9" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="20" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M1 1h4l2.68 13.39a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.61h9.72a2 2 0 0 0 2-1.61L23 6H6"/></svg>
        <div class="badge" id="cart-badge">2</div>
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body">
      <div class="cart-title-wrap">
        <div class="cart-title">My Cart</div>
        <div class="cart-subtitle" id="cart-subtitle">2 items in your bag</div>
      </div>

      <div id="cart-items-list">
        <!-- rendered by JS -->
      </div>

      <!-- Promo -->
      <div class="promo-wrap">
        <div class="promo-label">🏷 Promo Code <span>(try LEMON10)</span></div>
        <div class="promo-row">
          <input class="promo-input" type="text" placeholder="Enter code (try LEMON10)" id="promo-input" />
          <button class="apply-btn" onclick="applyPromo()">Apply</button>
        </div>
        <div id="promo-msg" style="font-size:11px;margin-top:6px;color:var(--green);display:none;">✔ Promo applied! 10% off.</div>
      </div>

      <!-- Summary -->
      <div class="summary-card">
        <div class="summary-row"><span>Subtotal</span><span id="summary-subtotal">₱1,950</span></div>
        <div class="summary-row">
          <span>Delivery Fee</span>
          <span class="free-tag">FREE</span>
        </div>
        <div class="free-note" style="padding:0 0 6px;">✔ Free delivery on orders ₱500+</div>
        <div id="discount-row" class="summary-row" style="display:none;color:var(--green);">
          <span>Promo Discount</span><span id="discount-val">−₱0</span>
        </div>
        <div class="summary-row total"><span>Total</span><span id="summary-total">₱1,950</span></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="cart-footer">
      <button class="checkout-btn" onclick="goScreen('place-order')">
        Proceed to Checkout →
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 5: PLACE ORDER ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-place-order">
    <div class="cart-header-yellow">
      <button class="icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('cart')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--dark);fill:none;stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg>
      </button>
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," style="width:52px;height:52px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;box-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,.12);" alt="Lemon Square" />
        <div class="logo-tagline">Always real goodness</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:38px;"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body">
      <div class="order-page-title">Place Order</div>
      <div class="order-subtitle">Review your details before confirming.</div>

      <div class="delivery-tabs">
        <button class="delivery-tab active" id="tab-delivery" onclick="selectDelivery('delivery')">🚚 Delivery</button>
        <button class="delivery-tab" id="tab-pickup" onclick="selectDelivery('pickup')">🏬 Store Pickup</button>
      </div>

      <div id="delivery-section">

  <!-- Address -->
  <div class="order-section">
    <div class="order-card">
      <div class="order-card-header">
        <span class="order-card-title">📍 Delivery Address</span>
        <button class="change-btn">Change</button>
      </div>

      <div class="address-name">Maria Santos</div>
      <div class="address-line">
        123 Sampaguita St., Brgy. Maligaya,<br>
        Quezon City, Metro Manila 1100
      </div>
      <div class="address-phone">📞 +63 917 123-4567</div>
      <div class="eta-badge">🚚 FREE – Est. 30–45 mins</div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Order Items -->
      <div class="order-section">
        <div class="order-card">
          <div class="order-items-header">
            <span class="order-card-title" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;">Order Items</span>
            <span class="order-items-count" id="order-items-count">3 items</span>
          </div>
          <div id="order-items-list"><!-- rendered by JS --></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
  <!-- Payment -->
  <div class="order-section">
    <div class="order-card">
      <div class="order-card-header">
        <span class="order-card-title">💳 Payment Method</span>
        <button class="change-btn">Change</button>
      </div>

      <div class="payment-option">
        <div class="payment-left">
          <div class="payment-icon">G</div>
          <div>
            <div class="payment-name">GCash</div>
            <div class="payment-num">+63 917 ••••567</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="radio-dot"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div class="place-order-footer">
    <button class="place-order-btn" id="place-order-btn" onclick="placeOrder()">
      Place Order • <span id="place-order-total">₱1,950</span>
    </button>
    <div class="tos-note">
      By placing your order you agree to our <a href="#">Terms & Privacy Policy</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!--Pickup section-->
<div id="pickup-section" style="display:none;">

  <!-- Address -->
  <div class="order-section">
    <div class="order-card">
      <div class="order-card-header">
        <span class="order-card-title">🏬 Pickup Address</span>
      </div>

      <div class="address-name">Lemon Square Bakery</div>
      <div class="address-line">
        Unit 18 DFCS Complex Building, Dr Arcadio Santos Ave,<br>
        San Isidro, Parañaque, Philippines
      </div>

      <div class="address-phone">📞 +639985784272</div>

      <div class="eta-badge" style="margin-bottom:10px;">
        🕐 Ready in 20–30 mins
      </div>

      <!-- MAP -->
      <div style="border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);">
        <iframe
          src="https://www.google.com/maps?q=Lemon+Square+Bakery+Treats+-+Sucat+Parañaque&output=embed"
          width="100%"
          height="160"
          style="border:0;display:block;">
        </iframe>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

    <!-- Order Items -->
      <div class="order-section">
        <div class="order-card">
          <div class="order-items-header">
            <span class="order-card-title" style="font-size:12px;font-weight:700;color:var(--muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.5px;">Order Items</span>
            <span class="order-items-count" id="order-items-count-pickup">3 items</span>
          </div>
          <div id="order-items-list-pickup"><!-- rendered by JS --></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      
  <!-- Payment -->
  <div class="order-section">
    <div class="order-card">
      <div class="order-card-header">
        <span class="order-card-title">💳 Payment Method</span>
        <button class="change-btn">Change</button>
      </div>

      <div class="payment-option">
        <div class="payment-left">
          <div class="payment-icon">G</div>
          <div>
            <div class="payment-name">GCash</div>
            <div class="payment-num">+63 917 ••••567</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="radio-dot"></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- Footer -->
  <div class="place-order-footer">
    <button class="place-order-btn" id="place-order-btn-pickup" onclick="placeOrder()">
      Place Order • <span id="place-order-total-pickup">₱1,950</span>
    </button>
    <div class="tos-note">
      By placing your order you agree to our <a href="#">Terms & Privacy Policy</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

  </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 6: NOTIFICATIONS ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-notifications">
    <div class="header-yellow">
      <button class="icon-btn" onclick="goScreen('home')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" style="width:22px;height:22px;stroke:var(--dark);fill:none;stroke-width:2.5;stroke-linecap:round;stroke-linejoin:round;"><polyline points="15 18 9 12 15 6"/></svg>
      </button>
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <div class="logo-icon">🔔</div>
      </div>
      <div style="width:38px;"></div>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body">
      <div class="notif-header-row">
        <div class="notif-title">Notifications</div>
        <button class="clear-all-btn" onclick="clearNotifications()">Clear all</button>
      </div>
      <div class="notif-list" id="notif-list"><!-- rendered by JS --></div>
    </div>

    <div class="bottom-nav">
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('home')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
        Home
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
        Categories
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item active" onclick="goScreen('notifications')" style="position:relative;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
        Alerts
        <div class="badge nav-badge" id="alerts-badge-notifications" style="display:none;">0</div>
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('profile')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
        Profile
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ SCREEN 7: PROFILE ══ -->
  <div class="screen" id="screen-profile">
    <div class="header-yellow">
      <div style="width:38px;"></div>
      <div class="logo-wrap">
        <div class="logo-icon">👤</div>
      </div>
      <button class="icon-btn" onclick="showToast('Settings coming soon!')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="3"/><path d="M19.4 15a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33 1.82l.06.06a2 2 0 1 1-2.83 2.83l-.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82-.33 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1 1.51V21a2 2 0 0 1-4 0v-.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 9 19.4a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.82.33l-.06.06a2 2 0 1 1-2.83-2.83l.06-.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 .33-1.82 1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51-1H3a2 2 0 0 1 0-4h.09A1.65 1.65 0 0 0 4.6 9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33-1.82l-.06-.06a2 2 0 1 1 2.83-2.83l.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82.33H9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1-1.51V3a2 2 0 0 1 4 0v.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1 1.51 1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.82-.33l.06-.06a2 2 0 1 1 2.83 2.83l-.06.06a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-.33 1.82V9a1.65 1.65 0 0 0 1.51 1H21a2 2 0 0 1 0 4h-.09a1.65 1.65 0 0 0-1.51 1z"/></svg>
      </button>
    </div>

    <div class="screen-body">
      <div class="profile-card">
        <div class="profile-avatar">LS</div>
        <div class="profile-info">
          <div class="profile-name">Lemon Square</div>
          <div class="profile-email">lemonsquare@email.com</div>
        </div>
        <button class="profile-edit-btn" onclick="showToast('Edit profile coming soon!')">Edit</button>
      </div>

      <div class="profile-section-label">Preferences</div>
      <div class="profile-menu">
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="openLanguageModal()">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">🌐</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Language</div>
          <div class="profile-item-value" id="current-language">English</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Notification settings coming soon!')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">🔔</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Notification Settings</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="toggleTheme()">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">🎨</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Theme</div>
          <div class="profile-item-value" id="current-theme">Light</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
      </div>

      <div class="profile-section-label">Account</div>
      <div class="profile-menu">
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Order history coming soon!')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">📦</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">My Orders</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Saved addresses coming soon!')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">📍</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Saved Addresses</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Payment methods coming soon!')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">💳</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Payment Methods</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Your favorites coming soon!')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">🤍</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Favorites</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
      </div>

      <div class="profile-section-label">Support</div>
      <div class="profile-menu">
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Help center coming soon!')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">❓</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Help &amp; Support</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item" onclick="showToast('Thanks for the love! ⭐')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">⭐</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Rate Us</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
        <button class="profile-item logout" onclick="showToast('Logged out (demo only)')">
          <div class="profile-item-icon">🚪</div>
          <div class="profile-item-text">Log Out</div>
          <div class="profile-item-chevron">›</div>
        </button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="bottom-nav">
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('home')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M3 9l9-7 9 7v11a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2z"/><polyline points="9 22 9 12 15 12 15 22"/></svg>
        Home
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('categories')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><rect x="3" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="3" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="3" y="14" width="7" height="7"/><rect x="14" y="14" width="7" height="7"/></svg>
        Categories
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item" onclick="goScreen('notifications')" style="position:relative;">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M18 8A6 6 0 0 0 6 8c0 7-3 9-3 9h18s-3-2-3-9"/><path d="M13.73 21a2 2 0 0 1-3.46 0"/></svg>
        Alerts
        <div class="badge nav-badge" id="alerts-badge-profile" style="display:none;">0</div>
      </button>
      <button class="nav-item active" onclick="goScreen('profile')">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M20 21v-2a4 4 0 0 0-4-4H8a4 4 0 0 0-4 4v2"/><circle cx="12" cy="7" r="4"/></svg>
        Profile
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>

</div><!-- end .phone -->

<!-- Toast -->
<div class="toast" id="toast"></div>

<!-- Success overlay -->
<div class="success-overlay" id="success-overlay">
  <div class="success-icon">🎉</div>
  <div class="success-title">Order Placed!</div>
  <div class="success-sub">Your treats are being freshly packed.<br>Expected delivery in 30–45 minutes.</div>
  <button class="success-btn" onclick="resetOrder()">Back to Home</button>
</div>

<!-- Language modal -->
<div class="modal-overlay" id="language-modal">
  <div class="modal-sheet">
    <div class="modal-title">Choose Language</div>
    <div class="lang-option selected" data-lang="English" onclick="selectLanguage(this)">
      <span>English</span><span class="lang-check">✓</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-option" data-lang="Filipino" onclick="selectLanguage(this)">
      <span>Filipino</span><span class="lang-check">✓</span>
    </div>
    <div class="lang-option" data-lang="Taglish" onclick="selectLanguage(this)">
      <span>Taglish</span><span class="lang-check">✓</span>
    </div>
    <button class="modal-close-btn" onclick="closeLanguageModal()">Cancel</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
// ── DATA ──
const IMG = {
  'triple-choc': "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'ube-keso':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'blueberry-cc':"data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'cream-puffs': "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'cinnamon':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'butter-cro':  "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'choco-chip':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'snickerdoodle':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'glazed-donut':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'choco-donut':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'lemon-tart':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
  'red-velvet':    "data:image/jpeg;base64,",
};

const products = [
  { id:'ube-keso',    name:'Ube Keso Cake',        price:500,  cat:'Cakes',    emoji:'🍰', desc:'Vibrant ube halaya layered with creamy keso (cheese) frosting. A beloved Filipino classic that blends earthy purple yam with rich, slightly salty cheese.' },
  { id:'blueberry-cc',name:'Blueberry Cheesecake', price:480,  cat:'Cakes',    emoji:'🫐', desc:'Velvety New York-style cheesecake topped with a generous blueberry compote. Perfectly balanced between tangy cream cheese and sweet fruity topping.' },
  { id:'triple-choc', name:'Triple Chocolate Cake', price:550, cat:'Cakes',    emoji:'🎂', desc:'Rich triple-layered chocolate cake with decadent ganache, moist chocolate sponge, and dark chocolate shavings. A crowd favorite for celebrations and everyday indulgence.' },
  { id:'cream-puffs', name:'Cream Puffs (6pcs)',    price:240,  cat:'Pastries', emoji:'🧁', desc:'Light choux pastry shells filled with silky vanilla custard cream. Each bite-sized puff is dusted with powdered sugar and bursts with rich, smooth filling.' },
  { id:'cinnamon',    name:'Cinnamon Rolls (3pcs)', price:195,  cat:'Pastries', emoji:'🥐', desc:'Pillowy soft cinnamon rolls swirled with brown sugar and spice, finished with a warm cream cheese glaze. Best enjoyed fresh out of the oven.' },
  { id:'butter-cro',  name:'Butter Croissant',      price:95,   cat:'Pastries', emoji:'🥐', desc:'Flaky, buttery layers of laminated dough baked to a deep golden finish. Simple, classic, and impossible to stop at just one.' },
  { id:'choco-chip',  name:'Choco Chip Cookies',    price:180,  cat:'Cookies',  emoji:'🍪', desc:'Thick and chewy cookies loaded with semi-sweet chocolate chips. Crispy edges, gooey center — a timeless classic baked fresh every morning.' },
  { id:'snickerdoodle',name:'Snickerdoodle',         price:165, cat:'Cookies',  emoji:'🍪', desc:'Soft and pillowy sugar cookies rolled in cinnamon sugar. Slightly tangy from the cream of tartar, with a satisfying crinkled top.' },
  { id:'glazed-donut',name:'Glazed Donuts (2pcs)',   price:120, cat:'Donuts',   emoji:'🍩', desc:'Classic yeast-raised donuts with a paper-thin sugar glaze that shatters with every bite. Light, airy, and melt-in-your-mouth good.' },
  { id:'choco-donut', name:'Choco Ring Donut',       price:85,  cat:'Donuts',   emoji:'🍩', desc:'Fluffy ring donut dipped in rich chocolate glaze and topped with colorful sprinkles. A fun treat for all ages.' },
  { id:'red-velvet',  name:'Red Velvet Cupcake',     price:95,  cat:'Cakes',    emoji:'🧁', desc:'Moist red velvet cake topped with a generous swirl of tangy cream cheese frosting. Deep crimson color with a subtle cocoa flavor.' },
  { id:'lemon-tart',  name:'Lemon Tart',             price:145, cat:'Pastries', emoji:'🍋', desc:'Crisp buttery pastry shell filled with silky lemon curd. Bright, citrusy, and refreshingly tart — perfect for lemon lovers.' },
];

// ── CART STATE ──
let cart = [
  { ...products.find(p=>p.id==='triple-choc'), qty:1, size:'Regular', sizePrice:0 },
  { ...products.find(p=>p.id==='ube-keso'),    qty:2, size:'Large',   sizePrice:80 },
];

// Current detail product
let currentProduct = null;
let currentQty = 1;
let currentSizeIdx = 0;
const sizePrices = [0, 80, 150];

// ── NAVIGATION ──
const screens = ['home','categories','detail','cart','place-order','notifications','profile'];
const navScreens = ['home','categories'];
let screenHistory = ['home'];

function goScreen(name) {
  screens.forEach(s => {
    const el = document.getElementById('screen-'+s);
    if (el) el.classList.remove('active');
  });
  const el = document.getElementById('screen-'+name);
  if (el) el.classList.add('active');
  screenHistory.push(name);
  updateBadges();
  if (name === 'cart') renderCart();
  if (name === 'place-order') renderOrder();
  if (name === 'notifications') { renderNotifications(); markNotificationsRead(); }
}

function goDetail(id) {
  currentProduct = products.find(p => p.id === id);
  if (!currentProduct) return;
  currentQty = 1;
  currentSizeIdx = 0;
  document.getElementById('detail-name').textContent = currentProduct.name;
  document.getElementById('detail-price').textContent = '₱'+currentProduct.price;
  document.getElementById('detail-desc').textContent = currentProduct.desc;
  const mainImg = document.getElementById('detail-main-img');
  if (IMG[currentProduct.id]) {
    mainImg.src = IMG[currentProduct.id];
    mainImg.alt = currentProduct.name;
  } else {
    mainImg.src = '';
    mainImg.alt = '';
    // fallback: show emoji as background text
    mainImg.style.display = 'none';
    document.getElementById('detail-img').style.fontSize = '80px';
    document.getElementById('detail-img').setAttribute('data-emoji', currentProduct.emoji);
  }
  document.getElementById('qty-val').textContent = '1';
  document.querySelectorAll('.size-btn').forEach((b,i) => b.classList.toggle('active', i===0));
  updateDetailTotal();
  goScreen('detail');
}

// ── DETAIL LOGIC ──
function changeQty(d) {
  currentQty = Math.max(1, currentQty + d);
  document.getElementById('qty-val').textContent = currentQty;
  updateDetailTotal();
}
function selectSize(btn, idx) {
  currentSizeIdx = idx;
  document.querySelectorAll('.size-btn').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  updateDetailTotal();
}
function updateDetailTotal() {
  if (!currentProduct) return;
  const base = currentProduct.price + sizePrices[currentSizeIdx];
  document.getElementById('detail-total').textContent = '₱'+(base * currentQty);
}
function addToCart() {
  if (!currentProduct) return;
  const sizeNames = ['Regular','Large','XL'];
  const existing = cart.find(c => c.id === currentProduct.id && c.size === sizeNames[currentSizeIdx]);
  if (existing) {
    existing.qty += currentQty;
  } else {
    cart.push({ ...currentProduct, qty: currentQty, size: sizeNames[currentSizeIdx], sizePrice: sizePrices[currentSizeIdx] });
  }
  updateBadges();
  showToast(currentProduct.name+' added to cart!');
}

// ── CART LOGIC ──
function getCartTotal() {
  return cart.reduce((s, c) => s + (c.price + c.sizePrice) * c.qty, 0);
}
function getCartCount() {
  return cart.reduce((s, c) => s + c.qty, 0);
}
function updateBadges() {
  const count = getCartCount();
  document.querySelectorAll('[id$="-cart-badge"], #cart-badge').forEach(b => {
    b.textContent = count;
    b.style.display = count > 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
  });
}
function renderCart() {
  const list = document.getElementById('cart-items-list');
  if (cart.length === 0) {
    list.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:40px 16px;color:var(--muted);font-size:14px;">Your cart is empty 🛒</div>';
  } else {
    list.innerHTML = cart.map((item, i) => `
      <div class="cart-item">
        <div class="cart-item-img">${IMG[item.id] ? `<img src="${IMG[item.id]}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" />` : item.emoji}</div>
        <div class="cart-item-info">
          <div class="cart-item-name">${item.name}</div>
          <div class="cart-item-size">Size: ${item.size}</div>
          <div class="cart-item-price">₱${((item.price+item.sizePrice)*item.qty).toLocaleString()}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cart-item-controls">
          <button class="remove-btn" onclick="removeFromCart(${i})">Remove</button>
          <div class="mini-qty">
            <button class="mini-qty-btn" onclick="cartQty(${i},-1)">−</button>
            <span class="mini-qty-val">${item.qty}</span>
            <button class="mini-qty-btn plus" onclick="cartQty(${i},1)">+</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    `).join('');
  }
  const count = getCartCount();
  document.getElementById('cart-subtitle').textContent = count+' item'+(count!==1?'s':'')+' in your bag';
  const sub = getCartTotal();
  document.getElementById('summary-subtotal').textContent = '₱'+sub.toLocaleString();
  // reapply promo
  const discount = promoApplied ? Math.round(sub * .1) : 0;
  if (promoApplied) {
    document.getElementById('discount-row').style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('discount-val').textContent = '−₱'+discount.toLocaleString();
  }
  document.getElementById('summary-total').textContent = '₱'+(sub - discount).toLocaleString();
}
function removeFromCart(i) {
  cart.splice(i, 1);
  renderCart();
  updateBadges();
}
function cartQty(i, d) {
  cart[i].qty = Math.max(1, cart[i].qty + d);
  renderCart();
  updateBadges();
}

let promoApplied = false;
function applyPromo() {
  const code = document.getElementById('promo-input').value.trim().toUpperCase();
  const msg = document.getElementById('promo-msg');
  if (code === 'LEMON10') {
    promoApplied = true;
    msg.style.display = 'block';
    renderCart();
    showToast('Promo LEMON10 applied! 10% off.');
  } else {
    promoApplied = false;
    msg.style.display = 'none';
    msg.style.color = 'var(--red)';
    msg.textContent = '✘ Invalid promo code.';
    msg.style.display = 'block';
    renderCart();
    showToast('Invalid promo code.');
  }
}

// ── ORDER ──
function renderOrder() {
  const itemsHtml = cart.map(item => `
    <div class="order-item-row">
      <div class="order-item-img">${IMG[item.id] ? `<img src="${IMG[item.id]}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;" />` : item.emoji}</div>
      <div class="order-item-info">
        <div class="order-item-name">${item.name}</div>
        <div class="order-item-sub">${item.size} × ${item.qty}</div>
      </div>
      <div class="order-item-price">₱${((item.price+item.sizePrice)*item.qty).toLocaleString()}</div>
    </div>
  `).join('');

  const sub = getCartTotal();
  const discount = promoApplied ? Math.round(sub * .1) : 0;
  const total = sub - discount;
  const countText = cart.length+' items';
  const totalText = '₱'+total.toLocaleString();

  // Keep delivery & pickup sections perfectly in sync, regardless of which is active
  ['order-items-list', 'order-items-list-pickup'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.innerHTML = itemsHtml;
  });
  ['order-items-count', 'order-items-count-pickup'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.textContent = countText;
  });
  ['place-order-total', 'place-order-total-pickup'].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (el) el.textContent = totalText;
  });
}
function selectDelivery(type) {
  document.getElementById('tab-delivery')
    .classList.toggle('active', type === 'delivery');

  document.getElementById('tab-pickup')
    .classList.toggle('active', type === 'pickup');

  document.getElementById('delivery-section').style.display =
    type === 'delivery' ? 'block' : 'none';

  document.getElementById('pickup-section').style.display =
    type === 'pickup' ? 'block' : 'none';
}

function placeOrder() {
  document.getElementById('success-overlay').classList.add('show');
  const sub = getCartTotal();
  const discount = promoApplied ? Math.round(sub * .1) : 0;
  const total = '₱'+(sub - discount).toLocaleString();
  addNotification('Order Placed! 🎉', 'Your order ('+total+') is confirmed and being freshly packed. Estimated delivery in 30–45 minutes.', '✅');
}
function resetOrder() {
  cart = [];
  promoApplied = false;
  document.getElementById('promo-input').value = '';
  document.getElementById('promo-msg').style.display = 'none';
  updateBadges();
  document.getElementById('success-overlay').classList.remove('show');
  goScreen('home');
}

// ── CATEGORIES ──
let activeFilter = 'All';
function renderTreats(query='') {
  const grid = document.getElementById('treats-grid');
  const q = query.toLowerCase();
  const filtered = products.filter(p =>
    (activeFilter === 'All' || p.cat === activeFilter) &&
    (!q || p.name.toLowerCase().includes(q))
  );
  document.getElementById('treats-count').textContent = filtered.length+' items';
  document.getElementById('filter-heading').textContent = activeFilter === 'All' ? 'ALL TREATS' : activeFilter.toUpperCase();
  grid.innerHTML = filtered.map(p => `
    <div class="treat-card" onclick="goDetail('${p.id}')">
      <div class="treat-img">
        ${IMG[p.id] ? `<img src="${IMG[p.id]}" style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;position:absolute;top:0;left:0;" alt="${p.name}" />` : p.emoji}
        <div class="cat-badge">${p.cat}</div>
        <button class="heart-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();toggleHeart(this)" style="position:absolute;top:8px;right:8px;">🤍</button>
      </div>
      <div class="treat-info">
        <div class="treat-name">${p.name}</div>
        <div class="treat-price-row">
          <span class="treat-price">₱${p.price}</span>
          <button class="add-btn" onclick="event.stopPropagation();quickAdd('${p.id}')">+</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}
function setFilter(f, btn) {
  activeFilter = f;
  document.querySelectorAll('.filter-tab').forEach(b => b.classList.remove('active'));
  btn.classList.add('active');
  renderTreats(document.getElementById('search-input').value);
}
function filterTreats() {
  renderTreats(document.getElementById('search-input').value);
}
function quickAdd(id) {
  const p = products.find(x => x.id === id);
  if (!p) return;
  const ex = cart.find(c => c.id === id && c.size === 'Regular');
  if (ex) ex.qty++;
  else cart.push({ ...p, qty:1, size:'Regular', sizePrice:0 });
  updateBadges();
  showToast(p.name+' added!');
}

// ── NOTIFICATIONS ──
let notifications = [
  { id: 1, icon: '🍋', title: 'Welcome to Lemon Square!', message: 'Thanks for joining us. Enjoy 10% off your first order with code LEMON10.', time: '2 days ago', read: true },
];
let notifId = 2;

function addNotification(title, message, icon) {
  notifications.unshift({ id: notifId++, icon: icon || '📦', title, message, time: 'Just now', read: false });
  renderNotifications();
  updateAlertBadge();
}
function getUnreadCount() {
  return notifications.filter(n => !n.read).length;
}
function updateAlertBadge() {
  const count = getUnreadCount();
  document.querySelectorAll('.nav-badge').forEach(b => {
    b.textContent = count;
    b.style.display = count > 0 ? 'flex' : 'none';
  });
}
function renderNotifications() {
  const list = document.getElementById('notif-list');
  if (!list) return;
  if (notifications.length === 0) {
    list.innerHTML = `
      <div class="notif-empty">
        <div class="notif-empty-icon">🔔</div>
        <div class="notif-empty-title">No notifications yet</div>
        <div class="notif-empty-sub">We'll let you know when there's<br>something new for you.</div>
      </div>`;
    return;
  }
  list.innerHTML = notifications.map(n => `
    <div class="notif-card ${n.read ? '' : 'unread'}">
      ${n.read ? '' : '<div class="notif-dot"></div>'}
      <div class="notif-icon">${n.icon}</div>
      <div class="notif-body">
        <div class="notif-top-row">
          <div class="notif-name">${n.title}</div>
          <div class="notif-time">${n.time}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="notif-msg">${n.message}</div>
      </div>
    </div>
  `).join('');
}
function markNotificationsRead() {
  notifications = notifications.map(n => ({ ...n, read: true }));
  renderNotifications();
  updateAlertBadge();
}
function clearNotifications() {
  notifications = [];
  renderNotifications();
  updateAlertBadge();
  showToast('Notifications cleared');
}

// ── LANGUAGE (functional) ──
function openLanguageModal() {
  document.getElementById('language-modal').classList.add('show');
}
function closeLanguageModal() {
  document.getElementById('language-modal').classList.remove('show');
}
function selectLanguage(el) {
  document.querySelectorAll('.lang-option').forEach(o => o.classList.remove('selected'));
  el.classList.add('selected');
  const lang = el.getAttribute('data-lang');
  document.getElementById('current-language').textContent = lang;
  closeLanguageModal();
  showToast('Language set to ' + lang);
}


function toggleHeart(btn) {
  btn.textContent = btn.textContent === '🤍' ? '❤️' : '🤍';
}
let toastTimer;
function showToast(msg) {
  const t = document.getElementById('toast');
  t.textContent = msg;
  t.classList.add('show');
  clearTimeout(toastTimer);
  toastTimer = setTimeout(() => t.classList.remove('show'), 2200);
}

// ── THEME TOGGLE ──
let isDark = false;
function toggleTheme() {
  isDark = !isDark;
  document.getElementById('app').setAttribute('data-theme', isDark ? 'dark' : '');
  document.body.setAttribute('data-theme', isDark ? 'dark' : '');
  const btn = document.getElementById('theme-btn');
  if (btn) btn.textContent = isDark ? '☀️' : '🌙';
  const themeLabel = document.getElementById('current-theme');
  if (themeLabel) themeLabel.textContent = isDark ? 'Dark' : 'Light';
  showToast(isDark ? 'Dark mode on 🌙' : 'Light mode on ☀️');
}

// ── INIT ──
renderTreats();
updateBadges();
renderNotifications();
updateAlertBadge();
</script>
</body>
</html>
